summary: Full-stack testing of NetGuard v2 IR-based pipeline. Fixed IAM wildcard detection bug in parser.py and rule_engine.py. 11/11 backend API tests pass. Frontend tests pass - Dashboard, New Assessment (6 source tabs), Assessment Detail with expandable findings.

issues: Console hydration warning: <span> as child of <tbody> - React dev environment issue, not visible to users

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all pages load, all flows working

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test assessments during testing (AWS SSH, Cisco IOS ACL, Kubernetes NetworkPolicy, IAM wildcard, Route table)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: POST /api/v1/assess for AWS (CRITICAL), Cisco IOS (CRITICAL, cisco_ios stack), Kubernetes (CRITICAL, kubernetes stack), IAM wildcard (CRITICAL, IAM-001), Low-risk route table (MEDIUM, not CRITICAL). GET /api/v1/stats returns correct structure with by_risk_level and by_source. GET /api/v1/assessments excludes _id. GET /api/v1/assessments/{id} includes rule_findings with code_snippet, suggested_fix, line_number, resource_name. GET /api/v1/health/rag returns 4 collections (cve_knowledge, attack_techniques, policy_controls, change_history). Frontend: Dashboard with stats/charts/pipeline/table, New Assessment with 6 source tabs, Assessment Detail with expandable findings showing code snippet and suggested remediation.
mocked_integrations: Claude 3.5 Sonnet Analysis (Node 4 - placeholder returns mock based on rule findings)

bug_fixes_applied.issue: IAM wildcard detection fallback regex didn't match HCL format 'Action = ["*"]'
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Added multiple regex patterns to match both JSON and HCL formats for IAM wildcard detection

bug_fixes_applied.issue: AWS parser _parse_iam_block and _parse_iam_statements only matched JSON format ('"Action": ...') not HCL ('Action = ...')
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Updated regex patterns to match both JSON and HCL IAM policy formats

backend: RAG health returns healthy status with 4 collections
Stats returns correct counts for total, by_risk_level, by_source
Cisco IOS ACL SSH/RDP from any → CRITICAL, cisco_ios stack
IAM wildcard Action=* → CRITICAL, IAM-001 finding
Assessment detail has rule_findings with code_snippet, suggested_fix, line_number, resource_name
RAG enrichment includes CVE, ATT&CK, policy controls
frontend: Dashboard loads with stats, charts, pipeline viz, recent assessments table
New Assessment page shows 6 source tabs (GitHub PR, Firewall Rule, Network Device, Kubernetes, ServiceNow, Jira)
New Assessment submits and navigates to assessment detail page
Assessment Detail shows risk gauge, pipeline trace, rule findings section
Finding cards are expandable with code snippet and suggested remediation
